name: Crunchy Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Sweet baking chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8-inch round springform pan. Line the base with wax paper and grease the paper.
2. Put chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler. Place over simmering water, stirring occasionally, until melted. Set aside to cool slightly.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs and sugar together until pale and fluffy.
4. Slowly stir in melted chocolate.
5. Stir in candied fruit peel, cherries, almonds, and orange peel.
6. Add the coarsely crushed cookies and stir gently.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 8 hours, until firm.
9. Loosen the edge of the cake and remove side of pan.
10. Cut the cake into wedges and serve.
Do not let the cake stand at room temperature too long as it softens and becomes difficult to slice and serve. Do not be tempted to cut large wedges; this cake is very rich!
